name: Vetzyme Moult & Coat 150ml
shortDescription: This is a complementary pet-food for dogs/cats to help reduce excessive moulting (hair shedding) and promote a shiny/glossy coat. Vet-zyme moult & coat is a rich source of vitamins and energy.
description: A daily feed supplement for dogs and cats, to promote a shiny handsome coat. It will help to reduce excessive moulting which can cause fur balls. Moult problems are often caused by the dehydrating effects of central heating and warm weather. A good source of vitamins and energy, it also promotes strong bones and teeth and is great for all round good health. Daily Recommendations Mix the following amounts with food (5ml=1 tsp) Cats up to 5ML Dogs Dogs 5-25kg 5mL-7.5ML Dogs 25-35kg 7.5ML-10ML Dogs 35kg+ 10ML-15ML Contains selected refined cod liver oil to provide the following ingredients: Vitamins Per 5ml per Kg Vitamin A (Palmitate) 300g 65mg Vitamin D (Cholecalciferol) 2.5mg 0.54mg Vitamin E (dl tocopheryl acetate) 1.55mg 335mg Polyunsaturated 31.2%
